name: Diversified General
description_short: Diversified General Federal Credit Union is a small NCUA-insured credit union headquartered in Logansport, IN, offering savings accounts, CDs, and basic loan products to members.
description_long: Diversified General Federal Credit Union was founded in 1966 and operates as a federally chartered credit union with NCUA insurance protection. With approximately $19.37 million in assets and $17.75 million in deposits, it is a small community-based financial institution serving members in the Logansport, Indiana area. The credit union has been operating for nearly 60 years, suggesting stable institutional history within its local market. The credit union offers a range of deposit products including savings accounts, money market accounts, and certificates of deposit (CDs) with terms ranging from 6 months to 36 months. They also provide interest-bearing checking accounts and variable rate IRAs. On the lending side, they offer auto loans, personal loans, home equity products, and mortgages, though specific loan rate information was not publicly available at the time of the profile review. The institution serves as a member-owned cooperative financial institution typical of the credit union model. As a small, community-based credit union, Diversified General distinguishes itself through local decision-making and member-focused services. The institution maintains physical branch locations in the Logansport area and appears to prioritize direct member relationships rather than pursuing aggressive expansion. Their deposit rates and CD offerings are competitive within the small credit union space, though not exceptionally high compared to online-only institutions. For most consumers, Diversified General is best suited as a local banking option in the Logansport, IN area rather than a competitive national alternative. The institution's small asset base ($19.37M) means limited product sophistication and geographic service area. Members seeking comprehensive financial services, competitive national rates, or digital-first banking experiences would likely find better alternatives elsewhere. The lack of published loan rates and limited online presence suggest this is primarily a brick-and-mortar institution for local members.
services: Savings accounts (Share Accounts) with tiered APY rates
Money market accounts with deposit-based rate tiers
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with 6, 12, 18, 24, and 36-month terms
pros: NCUA federally insured deposits for member protection
Competitive CD rates up to 1.10% APY on 36-month terms
Variable IRA products available with rates starting at 0.75% APY
Money market accounts with tiered rates up to 0.35% APY
Interest-bearing checking accounts available with 0.10%-0.20% APY
Long establishment history since 1966 demonstrates institutional stability
Local branch presence in Logansport, IN for in-person member service
cons: Very small asset base ($19.37M) limits product offerings and technological capabilities compared to larger institutions
Loan rates not publicly published, requiring members to contact directly for pricing
Limited geographic service area restricted to local Logansport region; not practical for non-local members
No apparent online-only or digital-first banking services advertised
Savings account rates very low at 0.20% APY compared to online competitors offering 4%+ on high-yield savings
best_for: Logansport, IN area residents seeking local credit union membership with NCUA insurance
Members prioritizing personal relationships and local decision-making over digital convenience
Small savers and retirees interested in basic CD products and modest interest-bearing accounts
Local business owners or employees seeking community-based lending relationships
diagnosis: Diversified General is best for existing residents of the Logansport, Indiana area seeking a community-based, NCUA-insured credit union for basic banking services. The primary caveat is that as a very small institution with $19.37M in assets, it offers limited product sophistication, uncompetitive savings rates versus online banks, and no apparent digital banking advantages—making it unsuitable for consumers outside its immediate geographic service area or those seeking competitive national rates.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Diversified General Federal Credit Union in Logansport, IN offers savings accounts, CDs, and basic loan products.
